programmes.show_description: 1/3. Alexander McCartney is questioned by police after a 12-year-old girl is catfished online. Contains some strong language and disturbing scenes.

programmes.show_name: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm

programmes.show_description: Yinka Bokinni explores the life of Sean Combs, now jailed on prostitution-related charges. Contains very strong language and some upsetting scenes.
